prompt: Bird's-eye view abstract composition representing the 'circle-in-square' crop tension. A deep indigo blue blueprint grid serves as the base (representing the upload dimensions). In the center, a heavy, crystal-clear circular optical lens rests, perfectly magnifying the grid lines beneath it to represent the 'safe zone'. Outside the circle, the grid lines are slightly blurred or shadowed. A bright burnt orange drafting pencil sits diagonally in the corner, contrasting with the cool blue and purple tones. Minimalist, geometric, graphic design style. Kodak Portra 800 warmth with beautiful skin tones and gentle grain, shot on Canon R5, 50mm lens, f/1.8, intimate portrait quality, late afternoon glow, lifestyle photography for Kinfolk
